hooks.prompt: Read .claude/skills/qa-sweep/SKILL.md and apply its protocol to any implementation, debugging, investigation, or fixing task in this session. Also read .claude/skills/commit-pr/SKILL.md before any commit or PR operation.

IMPORTANT: First check if the environment variable or session flag 'stop_hook_active' is set — if so, return {"ok": true} immediately to prevent an infinite loop. Otherwise: Review everything completed in this session. Ask yourself: (1) Was all originally planned work actually implemented? (2) Were parallel sub-agents used for implementation? (3) Was an independent adversarial review done by a fresh sub-agent that assumed all work was wrong? (4) Was a completeness verification done? (5) Are you genuinely ≥95% confident all issues, related issues, and edge cases are covered? If ANY of these are false or confidence is below 95%, return {"ok": false, "reason": "<specific description of what still needs to be done>"} to force continuation. Only return {"ok": true} if all five criteria are genuinely met.
